schedules.name: Daily Brief
schedules.prompt: Act as Orchestrator. Create and complete a daily brief for the personal vault. The brief must include: (1) a simple maths problem with its solution, and (2) today's top Australian news headlines (fetch from a public news source). Then act as BookWorm and file the completed output as a note at vaults/personal/notes/Daily Briefs/YYYY-MM-DD - Daily Brief.md using the standard portable note format with YAML frontmatter (date, type: daily-brief, source: scheduled, tags: [daily-brief, news, australia]).
